aws.name: SSM Patch Manager deployed
aws.expected: Patch baselines configured for all OS types with maintenance windows
aws.remediation: Configure SSM Patch Manager with appropriate patch baselines and maintenance windows.

aws.name: Patch compliance within SLA
aws.expected: Critical patches applied within 15 days, high within 30 days
aws.remediation: Remediate non-compliant patches per defined SLAs.

aws.name: Amazon Inspector vulnerability findings addressed
aws.expected: No critical findings older than 15 days, no high findings older than 30 days
aws.remediation: Address Inspector findings within defined remediation timeframes.

aws.name: RDS automatic minor version upgrade enabled
aws.expected: AutoMinorVersionUpgrade=true on all RDS instances
aws.remediation: Enable automatic minor version upgrades on all RDS instances.

azure.name: Azure Update Manager configured
azure.expected: Periodic assessment enabled and update deployments scheduled for all VMs
azure.remediation: Enable Azure Update Manager with scheduled deployments for all VMs.

azure.name: Defender vulnerability assessment findings addressed
azure.expected: No critical vulnerability findings unresolved beyond 15 days
azure.remediation: Address Defender for Cloud vulnerability findings within SLAs.

azure.name: App Service platform version current
azure.expected: All App Services use current and supported platform versions
azure.remediation: Update App Service apps to use current, supported runtime versions.

gcp.name: OS Config patch management active
gcp.expected: Patch deployments scheduled for all managed instances
gcp.remediation: Configure OS Config patch deployments with recurring schedules.

gcp.name: GKE cluster auto-upgrade enabled
gcp.expected: Auto-upgrade enabled on all GKE node pools
gcp.remediation: Enable auto-upgrade on all GKE node pools.

gcp.name: Container vulnerability findings addressed
gcp.expected: No critical container vulnerabilities unresolved beyond 15 days
gcp.remediation: Rebuild container images to address critical vulnerability findings.

aws.name: GuardDuty malware protection enabled
aws.expected: GuardDuty Malware Protection feature enabled
aws.remediation: Enable GuardDuty Malware Protection for EBS volume scanning.

aws.name: EC2 instances have endpoint protection
aws.expected: Anti-malware/endpoint protection software installed on all instances
aws.remediation: Deploy endpoint protection solution on all EC2 instances.

aws.name: S3 Malware Scanning configured
aws.expected: GuardDuty S3 Malware Protection enabled for CUI buckets
aws.remediation: Enable GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3 on buckets receiving uploads.

azure.name: Defender for Endpoint deployed
azure.expected: Defender for Servers Plan 2 enabled with Defender for Endpoint integration
azure.remediation: Enable Defender for Servers Plan 2 with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

azure.name: Microsoft Antimalware extension deployed
azure.expected: IaaSAntimalware or MDE extension deployed on all Windows VMs
azure.remediation: Deploy Microsoft Antimalware extension on all Windows VMs.

gcp.name: Endpoint protection deployed on GCE instances
gcp.expected: Anti-malware agent deployed on all GCE instances
gcp.remediation: Deploy endpoint protection solution on all GCE instances.

gcp.name: Malware scanning enabled for Cloud Storage
gcp.expected: Malware scanning configured for buckets receiving external uploads
gcp.remediation: Configure malware scanning for Cloud Storage buckets receiving uploads.

aws.name: Security Hub findings notifications configured
aws.expected: Security Hub findings route to SNS/EventBridge for alerting
aws.remediation: Configure EventBridge rules to route Security Hub findings to notification channels.

aws.name: GuardDuty findings alerting configured
aws.expected: GuardDuty findings route to SNS or SIEM via EventBridge
aws.remediation: Configure EventBridge rules to alert on GuardDuty findings.

aws.name: AWS Health Dashboard alerts configured
aws.expected: AWS Health events route to notification channels
aws.remediation: Configure EventBridge rules for AWS Health events.

azure.name: Defender for Cloud email notifications
azure.expected: Security contacts configured with email notifications for high severity alerts
azure.remediation: Configure security contact email notifications in Defender for Cloud.

azure.name: Service Health alerts configured
azure.expected: Service Health alerts configured for security advisories
azure.remediation: Configure Service Health alerts for security advisory notifications.

gcp.name: SCC notification config for critical findings
gcp.expected: Notification configs route critical/high findings to Pub/Sub
gcp.remediation: Configure SCC notification channels for critical and high severity findings.

gcp.name: Cloud Monitoring alerting for security events
gcp.expected: Alert policies configured for security-relevant events
gcp.remediation: Create alert policies in Cloud Monitoring for security events.

aws.name: Endpoint protection auto-update enabled
aws.expected: Anti-malware/endpoint protection software configured for automatic updates
aws.remediation: Configure endpoint protection for automatic signature and engine updates.

aws.name: GuardDuty threat intelligence auto-updated
aws.expected: GuardDuty automatically updates threat intelligence feeds (always on)
aws.remediation: GuardDuty threat intelligence is automatically updated by AWS.

azure.name: Defender for Endpoint signature updates current
azure.expected: Defender for Endpoint signatures updated within last 24 hours
azure.remediation: Ensure Defender for Endpoint automatic updates are enabled.

gcp.name: Endpoint protection auto-update configured
gcp.expected: Anti-malware agents on instances configured for automatic updates
gcp.remediation: Configure automatic updates for endpoint protection agents.

aws.name: Periodic vulnerability scanning configured
aws.expected: Amazon Inspector continuous scanning enabled
aws.remediation: Enable Amazon Inspector for continuous vulnerability scanning.

aws.name: GuardDuty real-time malware scanning
aws.expected: GuardDuty Malware Protection scans EBS volumes on suspicious activity
aws.remediation: Enable GuardDuty Malware Protection for real-time malware detection.

aws.name: S3 object scanning for uploads
aws.expected: Real-time scanning configured for S3 objects from external sources
aws.remediation: Enable malware scanning for S3 objects uploaded from external sources.

azure.name: Scheduled VM vulnerability scans configured
azure.expected: Periodic vulnerability assessment scans configured for all VMs
azure.remediation: Enable periodic vulnerability assessment scanning in Defender for Cloud.

azure.name: Real-time protection enabled on endpoints
azure.expected: Real-time protection enabled on all Defender for Endpoint managed VMs
azure.remediation: Enable real-time protection in Defender for Endpoint settings.

gcp.name: Container vulnerability scanning continuous
gcp.expected: Continuous vulnerability scanning enabled on all container registries
gcp.remediation: Enable continuous vulnerability scanning on Artifact Registry.

gcp.name: Web Security Scanner periodic scans
gcp.expected: Periodic scan schedules configured for all web applications
gcp.remediation: Configure periodic Web Security Scanner scans for all web applications.

aws.name: GuardDuty monitors network traffic
aws.expected: GuardDuty enabled with VPC Flow Log and DNS Log analysis
aws.remediation: Enable GuardDuty with all data sources including VPC Flow Logs and DNS Logs.

aws.name: VPC Flow Logs analyzed for anomalies
aws.expected: VPC Flow Logs sent to CloudWatch Logs or S3 for analysis
aws.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs and configure analysis via GuardDuty or SIEM.

aws.name: Network Firewall IDS/IPS rules configured
aws.expected: Network Firewall configured with IDS/IPS rules for threat detection
aws.remediation: Configure AWS Network Firewall with Suricata-compatible IDS/IPS rules.

azure.name: Defender for Network deployed
azure.expected: Network threat protection enabled for traffic analysis
azure.remediation: Enable network threat protection in Defender for Cloud.

azure.name: Azure Firewall IDPS enabled
azure.expected: Azure Firewall Premium with IDPS in Alert and Deny mode
azure.remediation: Enable IDPS on Azure Firewall Premium in Alert and Deny mode.

azure.name: NSG flow log analytics enabled
azure.expected: Traffic Analytics enabled on NSG flow logs for traffic monitoring
azure.remediation: Enable Traffic Analytics on NSG flow logs.

gcp.name: Cloud IDS deployed for network monitoring
gcp.expected: Cloud IDS endpoints deployed in CUI VPCs for traffic inspection
gcp.remediation: Deploy Cloud IDS endpoints for network traffic inspection.

gcp.name: VPC Flow Logs analyzed
gcp.expected: VPC Flow Logs enabled and exported to BigQuery or SIEM for analysis
gcp.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs and configure export to BigQuery for network analysis.

gcp.name: Event Threat Detection monitors for attacks
gcp.expected: Event Threat Detection enabled for network-based threat detection
gcp.remediation: Enable Event Threat Detection in Security Command Center.

aws.name: GuardDuty UnauthorizedAccess findings monitored
aws.expected: UnauthorizedAccess finding type active and alerting configured
aws.remediation: Ensure GuardDuty UnauthorizedAccess findings are routed to alerting.

aws.name: CloudWatch anomaly detection configured
aws.expected: Anomaly detection configured for key security metrics
aws.remediation: Configure CloudWatch anomaly detection for authentication and access metrics.

aws.name: CloudTrail Insights enabled
aws.expected: CloudTrail Insights enabled for anomalous API activity detection
aws.remediation: Enable CloudTrail Insights for detecting unusual management event patterns.

azure.name: Azure AD Identity Protection configured
azure.expected: Identity Protection risk policies configured for sign-in and user risk
azure.remediation: Configure Azure AD Identity Protection risk-based Conditional Access policies.

azure.name: Sentinel UEBA enabled
azure.expected: User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) enabled in Sentinel
azure.remediation: Enable UEBA in Microsoft Sentinel for anomalous behavior detection.

azure.name: Anomalous login alerts configured
azure.expected: Alerts configured for impossible travel, unfamiliar locations, and anomalous tokens
azure.remediation: Configure Identity Protection alerts for anomalous sign-in activity.

gcp.name: Event Threat Detection for unauthorized access
gcp.expected: Event Threat Detection monitors for unauthorized access attempts
gcp.remediation: Enable Event Threat Detection in Security Command Center.

gcp.name: Anomaly detection alerts configured
gcp.expected: Alert policies configured for anomalous login patterns and API usage
gcp.remediation: Create alert policies for anomalous authentication and API usage patterns.

gcp.name: Access Transparency logs monitored
gcp.expected: Access Transparency logs reviewed for Google admin access to CUI data
gcp.remediation: Enable Access Transparency and configure monitoring of admin access logs.
